title: Private Financial Networks
tagline: Money that moves securely and freely, without surveillance or control.
summary: A reference settlement layer for Circles and other Logos communities that lets members pay and receive without exposing balances or counterparties.
description: Most stablecoin rails leak the entire transaction graph by default. We are funding a privacy-preserving payment network for Logos communities: stealth addresses, private balances, and selective disclosure for compliance-sensitive deployments. Deliverables: protocol spec, reference wallet integration, threat model + audit, and a tested deployment in at least one Circle.
